content.en:
After leaving the Abyssal Land, the clone shuttled through the Void at great speed.

He hasn't relaxed yet, and only when the doppelganger returns to his body can he be truly relieved.

Over time, the situation in the Abyssal Lands has changed a lot.

Lord Chenhai and the others couldn't help the third-order void beast, but Lord Chenhai still snatched a lot of good things.

The information that Ye Tian said was correct, there were indeed many top-notch resources born on that black island, which were enough to make the Immortal Realm Lords excited, and even useful to the Chenhai Lords.

However, there were not many Eternal Realms that could really snatch good things, and even a few Immortal Realm Lords were almost killed.

Now, they don't dare to set foot on that black island anymore.

After a long time.

Ye Tian's doppelganger returned to the space-time territory, and passed through the space-time territory, ~ came to the Baji Tower.

The Eight Poles Tower has a great influence in the space-time territory, and naturally there are channels to enter the Source Sea.

For example, the Eight Poles Building cooperates with many Eternal Realm Lords, and you can ask the Eternal Realm Lords to take the members of the Eight Poles Tower to the Source Sea, and you only need to pay some time and space coins.

So, Ye Tian found an Eternal Realm Lord through the relationship of the Eight Pole Towers, the Lord of the Wolf Fang.

This lord has a good relationship with the Eight Pole Building, mainly an Eternal Realm who has been promoted from the Eight Pole Building, and takes good care of the Wolf Tooth Lord, which makes the Wolf Tooth Lord close to the Eight Pole Tower.

Ye Tian immediately contacted this wolf tooth lord, and immediately came to the wolf tooth lord's wolf tooth territory.

Wow!

Ye Tian walked out of the space-time passage and entered the Wolf Tooth Territory, and soon met this Wolf Tooth Lord.

The Wolf Tooth Lord is not human, but a giant wolf in human form.

"I've seen the Wolf Tooth Lord!"

Ye Tian greeted very politely.

"The Endless Ancestor of the Eight Pole Towers, are you going to the Source Sea?" asked the Wolf Tooth Lord with some doubts.

Because in his opinion, Ye Tian should not have touched the second boundary barrier, and he didn't need to impact the half-step Eternal Realm level of the Nine Extremes Realm, why did he go to the Source Sea at this time?

Ye Tian saw the Wolf Tooth Lord's doubts, so he explained: "Lord Wolf Tooth, I am a creature of the Source Sea, so I want to go back and take a look. "

"Origin Sea Creatures!"

The Wolf Tooth Lord's attitude changed suddenly, and he said with a smile: "I didn't expect that the Endless Ancestor you turned out to be a source sea being, many Eight Extremes Realm is extremely envious of the Source Sea Being, as a Source Sea Being, the lifespan is endless, but the Eight Extremes Realm of the space-time territory can only be the same as the half-step Eternal Realm, and they can only live for 10 million eternal years." However, the Eight Extremes Realm of the Origin Sea Creatures had enough time to impact the Nine Extremes Realm or the Eternal Realm. ".

Although the lifespan of sea creatures is infinite, it is extremely difficult to grow to the extreme realm, in the era of the source sea, there are only hundreds of extreme realms, and there are more than this number of realms in time and space. "

"It's the same thing, the rules of the source sea are too perfect, so it is difficult to practice, and the rules of the space-time territory are imperfect, which is equivalent to having loopholes, and there will be treasures and resources that are beyond the shackles of the rules, as well as various treasures, and even powerful physique and race, which are all situations that the source sea cannot appear. The Wolf Fang Lord said.

The two chatted for a while, and then got down to business.

I saw that the Wolf Tooth Lord handed Ye Tian a token, and said: "This is a special teleportation token, which can penetrate the barrier of the source sea and teleport into the space-time territory, although the speed of receiving information is slow, but once I receive the information, I can enter the source sea and take you out, without passing through the space-time island again." "

"Thank you, Lord Wolffang, these are a million space-time coins!"

Ye Tian casually handed over one million space-time coins to the Wolf Tooth Lord.

This is the cost of entering the source sea, but if it comes out, it will only cost 100,000 space-time coins.

"The Endless Ancestor is polite, take back this million space-time coins, and make a friend!"

Ye Tian roughly guessed the idea of the wolf tooth lord, he should value him very much, so he befriended him.

If it is the Eight Extremes Realm of the space-time territory, it is very likely that just like Gu He Yuanzu, the lifespan limit has come, and he has not yet broken through to the Nine Extremes Realm or the Eternal Realm, so he can only venture into some forbidden lands and Jedi to gamble.

And many of the Eight Extremes Realm are in the process of gambling, and they have completely fallen in a forbidden place.

And Ye Tian is different, he has a long lifespan, he can slowly survive, and finally feather into a butterfly, breaking through to the eternal realm.

Once the eight-pole realm half-step eternal realm breaks through to the eternal realm, at worst it is an immortal realm lord, and it is not a weak immortal realm, it is a powerful in the immortal realm.

Therefore, a mere 1,000,000 Space-Time Coins is nothing compared to befriending a future Lord of the Immortal Realm.

Ye Tian did not insist that the Wolf Tooth Lord accept these space-time coins, but took them back.

Immediately, the Wolf Tooth Lord began to take Ye Tian to the Source Sea.

Tear and pull!

The Wolf Fang Lord tore through the space-time barrier, and soon formed a space-time passage and arrived at the Source Sea Barrier.

Boom!

The source sea barrier was shattered, and the power of the wolf tooth lord wrapped Ye Tian and took Ye Tian into the source sea.

------------，-------

......... ，..... 0

Source Sea.

Ye Tian appeared in a strange territory, and the Wolf Tooth Lord was next to him.

At this time, the Wolf Tooth Lord said, "Endless Ancestor, I have already sent you here, so it is inconvenient for me to stay here. "

Then, the Lord of the Wolf Fang departed.

And Ye Tian quickly returned to the Dark Forbidden Domain, returned to the main body, and took out the purple stone.

Ye Tian touched the purple stone and felt that the treasure that made the copying talent extremely eager was at the core of the purple stone.

But the purple stone was extremely hard, so he melted the purple stone little by little, and it took a long time for the purple stone to crack.

Click!

The purple stone cracked, and a tiny purple bead appeared in the void.

At this time, the desire to copy the talent is extremely strong.

It's an instinct that the copying talent wants him to devour this purple bead.

"Heavenly Pole Origin Bead!"

This name came to Ye Tian's mind.

He picked up the Heavenly Pole Origin Bead and swallowed it in one gulp, and began to refine the Heavenly Pole Origin Bead.

Suddenly, a wave of energy poured into the world of the talent imprint that the copying talent had turned into, prompting the copying talent to begin to transform.

This transformation far surpassed any previous transformation, as if it was a transformation that crossed the rules, and even the origin of the source sea began to shake, as if announcing the birth of an existence against the sky.

I don't know how long it has taken for Ye Tian's transformation to really complete.

After the transformation was completed, Ye Tian immediately checked his copying talent. _

Fei Lu reminds you: three things to read - ∪ collection, recommendation, and sharing!(wx_938914883)
